why_looping: After work your brain is tired — opening the same 2022 playlist avoids the effort of choosing from thousands of saves.

discovery_paths.title: 5-minute mood reset
discovery_paths.description: Pick one energy level up or down from your comfort playlist — use Spotify's Daylist or a single-song seed radio, not Home scroll.

discovery_paths.title: Friend signal
discovery_paths.description: Check a close friend's public playlist or Blend — social proof lowers decision fatigue.

discovery_paths.title: Forgotten gem
discovery_paths.description: Sort Liked Songs by oldest added; play 3 tracks you saved but haven't heard in 6+ months.

recommended_action: Open Liked Songs sorted by 'Recently added' in reverse and play 3 tracks from 2+ years ago — low risk, still yours.

why_looping: On commute autopilot you want zero decisions — familiar playlists win over Discover Weekly that might miss your mood.

discovery_paths.title: Commute micro-challenge
discovery_paths.description: One new artist per trip: start radio from last week's most-played track, skip until one unfamiliar song lands.

discovery_paths.title: Podcast-to-music bridge
discovery_paths.description: If you listened to podcasts earlier, switch with a playlist tagged same energy as your wind-down mood.

discovery_paths.title: Queue one surprise
discovery_paths.description: Before you leave, add exactly one song from Release Radar to the top of queue — rest stays comfort.

recommended_action: Queue one Release Radar track before you start driving — keeps comfort but breaks the loop once.

why_looping: With 1k+ liked songs, browsing feels like work — replaying ten favorites is faster than exploring the graveyard.

discovery_paths.title: Random forgotten 10
discovery_paths.description: Use search filters or scroll to a random year in Liked Songs; commit to 10 tracks only.

discovery_paths.title: Shrink the choice
discovery_paths.description: Create a temporary 20-song 'this week' list from saves you haven't played in 90 days.

discovery_paths.title: Ask a friend
discovery_paths.description: Message one friend: 'What's one song you'd add to my Tuesday playlist?' — external pick beats algorithm when library is huge.

recommended_action: Filter Liked Songs to one old year and play 5 tracks — smaller set, same library.

why_looping: When ads hit while browsing, exploration feels punishing — you retreat to playlists you know won't trigger another interruption.

discovery_paths.title: Pre-plan before browse
discovery_paths.description: Decide one artist or playlist before opening app — avoids ad-heavy browse sessions.

discovery_paths.title: Downloaded discovery list
discovery_paths.description: When on Wi‑Fi, save 5 new tracks offline during premium trial or ad-free window.

discovery_paths.title: Social swap
discovery_paths.description: Trade playlists with a friend offline — no algorithm browse needed.

recommended_action: Pick one artist tonight before opening Spotify — skip Home browse entirely to avoid ad-triggered fallback.
